notes: The file formalizes Silverman IV.4 in two independent blocks: (1) Corollary 4.3 (pullback of invariant differential under a formal group hom), proved by a coefficient-level computation via several private helper lemmas about multivariate finsupp coefficients; (2) Proposition 4.2 (translation invariance), proved by differentiating the associativity law in three variables and specializing to X=0 via a `shift3to2` substitution. The five `set_option maxHeartbeats` increases (up to 6.4M) on the central inductive coefficient lemma `coeff_10_FG_pow` (~209 lines) are the dominant computational cost; no sorries are present. The two public outputs `invariantDiff_chain` and `invariantDiff_translation` are consumed downstream by `FormalGroup/InvariantDiff.lean` and `FormalGroup/Logarithm.lean` respectively.
